name: Drop Doughnuts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup mashed potatoes (mashed with milk and butter)
Additional sugar OR confectioners' sugar -- optional
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mashed potatoes, sugar, beaten egg, sour cream, and vanilla extract.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: flour, baking soda, and baking powder.
3. Stir the dry mixture into the potato mixture until well combined.
4. Heat oil in an electric skillet or deep-fat fryer to 375°F (190°C).
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough (about 5 to 6 at a time) into the hot oil.
6. Fry for 1 minute per side, or until golden brown.
7. Remove the doughnuts from the oil using tongs and drain on paper towels.
8. Roll in sugar if desired.
9. Serve immediately.
YIELD: 3 to 3 1/2 dozen
